explanations.1: This line names this Docker build stage 'building_production' so we can refer to it later, like when copying files from it into a final image.
explanations.4: The backslash at the end lets us continue this command on the next line; it's just telling Docker 'this command isn't finished yet'.
explanations.13: The `package.*` pattern matches both `package.json` and `package-lock.json` (or `yarn.lock`) — it's a wildcard that grabs both at once.
explanations.16: The `--immutable` flag means yarn will fail if the lockfile doesn't match what's in package.json, guaranteeing the same versions build every time.
